name: Chinese Chicken Salad-WW
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium glass bowl (not aluminum), combine pineapple juice (reserved from can) vinegar, soy sauce, mustard, oil, and seasoned salt.
2. Add chicken which has been skinned, boned, cooked, and cut into thin strips, and toss to coat.
3. Cover with plastic wrap and refrigerate for 1 hour. Toss the mixture occasionally.
4. In another bowl, combine lettuce, sliced green onions, and parsley; toss to combine. Cover with plastic wrap and refrigerate until ready to use.
5. To serve, line a serving platter with the lettuce mixture.
6. Spoon the chicken mixture onto the lettuce mixture.
7. Top the chicken with pineapple chunks, bell pepper, and water chestnuts.
8. Garnish with green onion (trimmed and cut lengthwise into 4 strips) and sprinkle with sesame seed.
245 calories/serving.
